title: Jira API access forbidden with Atlassian Service Account
symptom: When attempting to retrieve Jira tickets using the Jira node with an Atlassian Service Account, the user receives a 'Forbidden' error message indicating a potential credential issue.
not_this_if: Using a personal API token from a regular Atlassian user account
root_cause: n8n does not currently support Atlassian's new Service Account feature, leading to authentication failures when attempting to access the Jira API with these credentials. This is a compatibility issue with the service account method.
fix_steps: Switch to using a personal API token from a regular Atlassian user account
Update the Jira node settings with the new credentials
Test the connection to ensure it works
agent_instruction: Use a personal API token from a regular Atlassian user account instead of the Service Account for Jira API access.
